allow: Build and test commands for the cloudelog project (stack build/test/exec/ghc, cabal build/test, elm make, elm-test) anywhere under /Users/carlson/dev/cloudelog, including shell compounds with leading cd into subdirectories, pipes to head/tail/less/grep, 2>&1 redirects, and output files written to $TMPDIR or inside the cloudelog tree. Does not cover commands that delete files, push to remotes, install dependencies, or invoke other interpreters (node, python, bash -c, npx).
